title: Peak Season Full Board Stay - Samburu Elephant Lodge
description: Experience the magic of Samburu during peak wildlife season (July-October & December 20-January 10). Full board includes all meals, guided game drives, and stunning views of the Ewaso Nyiro River. Watch elephants visit the lodge daily. Accommodation in spacious rooms with en-suite bathrooms, mosquito nets, and private verandas.

q_and_a.question: What meals are included in Full Board?
q_and_a.answer: Full Board includes breakfast, lunch, and dinner. All meals are prepared fresh with a mix of local and international cuisine.

q_and_a.question: When is peak season?
q_and_a.answer: Peak season runs from July to October and December 20 to January 10, offering the best wildlife viewing opportunities.

q_and_a.question: Is there a single supplement?
q_and_a.answer: Yes, solo travelers pay a 50% single supplement on the room rate.

title: Peak Season Half Board Stay - Samburu Elephant Lodge
description: Enjoy peak wildlife season (July-October & December 20-January 10) with half board accommodation. Includes breakfast and dinner, spacious rooms with river views, and daily elephant visits. Perfect for guests who prefer flexibility with lunch arrangements.

q_and_a.question: What meals are included in Half Board?
q_and_a.answer: Half Board includes breakfast and dinner. Lunch can be arranged separately.

q_and_a.question: What are the check-in and check-out times?
q_and_a.answer: Check-in is from 2:00 PM and check-out is by 10:00 AM.

title: Mid Season Full Board Stay - Samburu Elephant Lodge
description: Experience Samburu during the beautiful mid-season months (March-June, November 1-December 19, January 11-March 31). Full board includes all meals, guided game drives, and exceptional wildlife viewing at reduced rates. Comfortable rooms overlooking the Ewaso Nyiro River.

q_and_a.question: What is mid-season?
q_and_a.answer: Mid-season covers March-June, November 1-December 19, and January 11-March 31. Great value with excellent wildlife viewing.

q_and_a.question: Are children welcome?
q_and_a.answer: Yes! Children under 3 stay free, and children 3-12 years receive a 50% discount.

title: Mid Season Half Board Stay - Samburu Elephant Lodge
description: Enjoy mid-season rates with half board accommodation including breakfast and dinner. Experience wildlife, river views, and the famous visiting elephants at excellent value during shoulder season months.

q_and_a.question: What meals are included?
q_and_a.answer: Half Board includes breakfast and dinner.

title: Low Season Full Board Stay - Samburu Elephant Lodge
description: Best value safari experience during low season (April-June). Full board includes all meals and guided game drives. Fewer crowds, lush green landscapes, and intimate wildlife encounters. All rooms feature en-suite bathrooms and private verandas.

q_and_a.question: What is low season like?
q_and_a.answer: Low season (April-June) offers the best rates, green landscapes after rains, fewer tourists, and excellent bird watching opportunities.

q_and_a.question: Is Wi-Fi available?
q_and_a.answer: Yes, complimentary Wi-Fi is available throughout the lodge.

title: Low Season Half Board Stay - Samburu Elephant Lodge
description: Our most affordable option during green season (April-June). Half board includes breakfast and dinner. Enjoy peaceful wildlife viewing, lush scenery, and the authentic Samburu experience at unbeatable rates.

q_and_a.question: What meals are included?
q_and_a.answer: Half Board includes breakfast and dinner.

title: Child Rate (3-12 years) - Samburu Elephant Lodge
description: Special rate for children aged 3-12 years - 50% off adult rates. Children under 3 stay completely free. Family-friendly safari experience with kid-appropriate activities and meals. All seasons available.

q_and_a.question: What age qualifies for child rates?
q_and_a.answer: Children 3-12 years receive 50% off adult rates. Children under 3 years stay free of charge.

q_and_a.question: Are there activities for children?
q_and_a.answer: Yes, we offer nature walks, bird watching, and educational wildlife experiences suitable for children.
